task_completion.description: The agent opens the original presentation and the brand guidelines document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A presentation software (e.g., WPS Presentation) is open showing 'performance.pptx' and a text editor or viewer is open showing 'brand_guidelines.txt'.

task_completion.description: The first slide title is updated to match the brand guidelines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The first slide's title text frame is changed to exactly 'CloudServer Pro: Performance Benchmarking Solutions'.

task_completion.description: The ALL CAPS slide titles are corrected to normal casing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Slides 9, 14, and 20 (1-based) are viewed and their titles are edited to remove the ALL CAPS formatting (changed to Title Case or Sentence case).

task_completion.description: The last slide's title is updated to 'Contact Us'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final slide in the presentation has its title changed to 'Contact Us'.

task_completion.description: The required email and phone number are added to the last slide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final slide includes the text 'sales@cloudserverpro.com' and '1-800-CLOUD-PRO'.

task_completion.description: The modified presentation is saved to the correct new path without overwriting the original.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The presentation software's title bar shows 'branded_cloudserver.pptx' or a 'Save As' dialog is used to save it to '/home/ga/Documents/branded_cloudserver.pptx'.

integrity.description: The agent uses a GUI presentation editor to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show WPS Presentation or a similar GUI app being used, rather than a terminal script modifying the PPTX file.

integrity.description: The original file is not overwritten.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses 'Save As' to create the new file, or copies the file before editing, leaving the original 'performance.pptx' intact.

integrity.description: The agent actively interacts with the slides.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show text selection, cursor placement, or typing within the presentation slides.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Verified facts for the VLM verifier:
- Guidelines file: /home/ga/Desktop/brand_guidelines.txt
- Required first slide title: 'CloudServer Pro: Performance Benchmarking Solutions'
- Required last slide title: 'Contact Us'
- Required email: 'sales@cloudserverpro.com'
- Required phone: '1-800-CLOUD-PRO'
- Output file: /home/ga/Documents/branded_cloudserver.pptx
- Original file: /home/ga/Documents/presentations/performance.pptx
- ALL CAPS violations were injected into slides 9, 14, and 20 (1-based slide numbers). The agent must fix these to normal casing. Slide 5 does not have an ALL CAPS violation and requires no fix.
